news.summary: The cultural importance of the iconic representation of the Virgin Mary holds great significance for Hispanic communities, often linked to tales of miraculous events. news.headline: Tickets on sale for PlayStation™ The Concert World Tour 2025-2026, starting on April 19th in Dublin, with music from popular games.
news.summary: Tickets for PlayStation™ The Concert are currently available for purchase. This highly anticipated event is scheduled to premiere on April 19, 2025, in Dublin. Attendees can look forward to a cutting-edge live performance showcasing music from popular video game titles such as God of War, The Last of Us, the Horizon franchises, Ghost of Tsushima, and others. After its initial showing in Dublin, the concert will commence a worldwide tour to bring the exhilarating experience to fans across the globe.

news.headline: US Federal Budget Balance Actual 64.26B (Forecast 60B, Previous 380B)
FDA provides updates on increasing access to IV and PD fluids. Efforts continue to improve supply and accessibility.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland on October 18, 2024, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration released a summary of updates. The FDA is focused on enhancing access to IV and peritoneal dialysis (PD) fluids. This initiative aims to address shortages and improve availability for patients in need. Efforts are underway to boost the supply chain for these vital fluids as part of the ongoing FDA commitment to healthcare.

news.headline: BCB Bancorp (NASDAQ: BCBP) beats Q3 earnings estimate with $0.36 per share, 12.50% surprise. Revenues at $26.17M, surpassing estimates by 3.49%.
news.summary: BCB Bancorp (NASDAQ: BCBP) reported quarterly earnings of $0.36 per share, exceeding the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.32 per share and down from $0.39 per share last year. This marks an earnings surprise of 12.50%. In the previous quarter, the company had an earnings surprise of -53.33%. The company has beaten EPS estimates only once in the last four quarters. Revenues for the quarter ended September 2024 were $26.17 million, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 3.49% but lower than the year-ago figure of $27.09 million. The stock's future performance will largely depend on management's earnings call commentary. BCB Bancorp shares belong to the Zacks Banks - Northeast industry. Further details can be read on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Netflix surpasses all Wall St. metrics; strong iPhone demand in China spikes. - Financial news
Tyler Kamp, candidate for Maricopa County Sheriff, talks on KTAR News about his 20-year career in law enforcement.
news.summary: In Phoenix, Tyler Kamp, a candidate for Maricopa County Sheriff, recently appeared on KTAR’s Outspoken to talk about the upcoming election with less than 20 days remaining. During the live radio segment, Kamp delved into his extensive background in law enforcement, highlighting his 20-year career that includes roles such as Shift Commander, Gang Enforcement Sergeant, and Homicide Detective. Additionally, Kamp discussed his global experience, having served as the Director of Investigations and Law Enforcement Development for a non-specified organization.

news.headline: Bromine Market set to grow by USD 860.4 million from 2024-2028, powered by AI insights, mainly driven by oil & gas industry.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology predicts that the Global Bromine Market will experience significant growth over the period of 2024-2028, with an estimated increase of USD 860.4 million. The market is expected to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 3.5% during this forecasted period.

This announcement was made by Axon on October 18, 2024, in Scottsdale, Arizona. Axon (Nasdaq: AXON), a major player in public safety technologies, revealed that this waiver will enable the police department to enhance their operations.

news.headline: LEGO and McLaren Racing bring a full-scale deconstructed LEGO Technic McLaren F1 car to US Grand Prix, Oct 18-20, 2024.
news.summary: Beginning on October 18, 2024, in Austin, Texas, fans will have the opportunity to admire a life-sized deconstructed LEGO Technic® McLaren Formula 1 race car. Attendees can also partake in build activities at the fan area during the event.Both the LEGO Group and McLaren Racing have come together to provide this unique experience to race fans, promising an exclusive and exciting event from October 18 to October 20, 2024.

news.headline: New insurance codes by AMA will improve access to scalp cooling for cancer patients, a milestone for Cooler Heads and hospitals.
news.summary: In San Diego on October 18, 2024, Cooler Heads, a prominent company in scalp cooling technology, commemorates a significant development in healthcare. The American Medical Association (AMA), responsible for establishing Current Procedural Terminology (CPT) codes essential for medical billing, has unveiled a set of new codes.

Subprime crisis-era mortgage making a comeback, with increasing popularity.
3M to report Q3 2024 results; estimates at $1.93 EPS and $6.1B revenue, a 28% and 26.6% decline YoY respectively. Positive earnings history and prediction for an earnings beat this quarter.
news.summary: 3M Company is set to announce its third-quarter 2024 results on October 22. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings is $1.93 per share, up 0.5% in the past 60 days. This reflects a 28% decline from last year. Revenues are estimated at $6.1 billion, down 26.6% year over year. The recent spin-off of the Health Care business may impact the top-line comparison. Despite this, third-quarter performance is expected to benefit from various factors. 3M has a history of surpassing earnings estimates, with an average surprise of 12.6%. The company is expected to beat earnings this quarter as per the Earnings ESP model. This model suggests a positive trend for 3M. It currently holds a Zacks Rank of 3.

news.headline: BTC ETFs reach biggest inflow week since July, $1bn in BlackRock ETF. Venmo now supports crypto through Moonpay. XRP status unaffected by SEC appeal. Worldcoin rebrands to World, EigenLayer X hacked. Hacker of SEC X caught by FBI, stablecoins adopted by SCB in Thailand and DBS in Singapore. Trump family to receive 75% of WLFL revenue, Sybil addresses owned by Scroll team. STX Nakamoto upgrade scheduled for next week.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) exchange-traded funds (ETFs) experienced the highest inflow in a week since July, with BlackRock's ETF alone attracting $1 billion in inflows. Venmo users now have the ability to purchase cryptocurrency through Moonpay. The Security and Exchange Commission's (SEC) appeal regarding XRP does not contest its security classification. Worldcoin is rebranding to World and introducing a new orb. A compromised EigenLayer X account led to an FBI arrest of the hacker. Siam Commercial Bank (SCB) in Thailand is incorporating stablecoins for transfers, while DBS Bank in Singapore is enlisting 'token services.' The Trump family is set to receive 75% of WLFL revenue. The Scroll team is under scrutiny for owning sybil addresses. An upgrade to the STX Nakamoto is scheduled for next week.

news.headline: Oriental Rise Holding Limited closes IPO, offering 1.75M shares at $4 per share on NasdaqCM under ticker symbol “ORIS”.
news.summary: In Ningde, China, on October 18, 2024, Oriental Rise Holding Limited disclosed the completion of its initial public offering (IPO) with a total of 1,750,000 ordinary shares sold at a price of $4 per share. The company, known for being a leading supplier of tea products in mainland China, started trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market the day prior, on October 17, 2024, under the ticker symbol "ORIS" (NasdaqCM: ORIS).

news.headline: CFTC Positions Week Ended October 15th
Nvidia stock predicted to reach $190, analyst cites "generational opportunity" with 40% upside potential. Earnings estimates boosted by 13-20%.
news.summary: Bank of America has designated Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) as its top stock pick in the artificial intelligence (AI) sector, referring to the company as a "generational opportunity." The investment bank has upped its price target for Nvidia from $165 to $190, indicating a 40% potential upside from current market prices. Analyst Vivek Arya, recognizing Nvidia's dominance in AI chips and its future growth prospects, has increased the company's earnings estimates for 2025 and 2026 by 13% to 20%. Arya pointed out Nvidia's 80-85% market control in the AI industry, anticipating a total addressable market (TAM) exceeding $400 billion by 2024, a fourfold increase from previous estimates. This positive outlook is backed by recent developments within the industry.

news.headline: LG&E and KU predict load growth with data centers & economic development. Kentucky's economic boost leads to an increase in load.
news.summary: A recent IRP filing by utilities in Louisville, Kentucky on October 18, 2024, tackles the challenge of an increased load resulting from the significant economic growth in the state. This growth, particularly driven by the establishment of data centers and other economic development activities, has been robust. The filing encompasses various scenarios and strategies to address this surge in demand, reflecting the changing landscape of the state. Kentucky has experienced remarkable economic progress, with certain sectors witnessing notable expansion including data centers, driving up the energy needs. The utilities' proactive approach in their IRP filing demonstrates a readiness to adapt to the escalating demand for energy in the region.

news.headline: Nokia Corp buys back own shares on October 18, 2024.

Cryptocurrency prices surge as BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF amasses $1 billion. Notable stats: 98% Bitcoin holders profit, 3% break even. 37,689 traders liquidated in 24 hrs, totaling $113.04 million. Bitcoin dominance hits 65% (3-yr high). Worldcoin rebrands as 'World' and launches blockchain.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is on the rise with BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF amassing $1 billion in BTC. Bitcoin is priced at $68,954.45 with a 2.9% gain, while Ethereum is at $2,665.94 (+2.9%). Other notable increases include Solana (+5%), Dogecoin (+14.2%), and Shiba Inu (+6.6%). Notable stats include a 16.4% decrease in large transactions but a 19.9% growth in daily active addresses. Over 37,000 traders were liquidated in 24 hours, totaling $113.04 million in losses. With Bitcoin holders seeing profits, a supply shock is predicted as the exchange reserves hit all-time lows. Additionally, Bitcoin dominance has crossed 65% for the first time since early 2021. Worldcoin is rebranding to 'World' and launching its blockchain.

news.headline: Micron Technology stock receives RS Rating upgrade due to improving price performance. Details in Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Micron Technology has seen a boost in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The tech company's stock has shown improvement, resulting in a positive shift in its rating. This upgrade reflects Micron Technology's strong performance in the market.

news.headline: Robinhood's Steve Quirk notes new offerings like crypto and futures are popular, with Bitcoin as the top traded investment. Customers around the age of 30, with 50% of trades done on mobile.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ:HOOD) has experienced significant growth, evolving from focusing primarily on young and retail users to catering to a broader demographic, as stated by the company's Chief Brokerage Officer Steve Quirk at the 2024 HOOD Summit. Quirk, with a background in TD Ameritrade and Cboe, highlighted that Robinhood's customer base skews towards younger individuals, with an average age in the low 30s. Approximately 50% of self-directed trading on Robinhood takes place via mobile, showcasing the platform's emphasis on accessibility and user-friendly technology. Quirk emphasized the differences in product development strategies between traditional trading firms and Robinhood, noting that their technology and offerings are tailored to meet the needs of their diverse customer base.

news.headline: Scott Braswell, 3rd generation CEO of Braswell Family Farms, has passed away in 2024, leaving behind a legacy of dedication.
news.summary: In Nashville, North Carolina, on October 18, 2024, Braswell Family Farms released a statement through PRNewswire expressing deep sorrow over the death of Scott Braswell, the 3rd generation CEO. Scott passed away peacefully with family by his side, leaving behind a legacy of commitment.

news.headline: Monday FX Option Expiries
Gilead withdraws US accelerated approval of Trodelvy as bladder cancer treatment after failed trial. FDA consulted.
news.summary: Gilead Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ:GILD) recently announced its decision to withdraw the U.S. accelerated approval for Trodelvy (sacituzumab govitecan-hziy; SG) intended for adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic urothelial cancer who had previously undergone platinum-containing chemotherapy and either programmed death receptor-1 (PD-1) or programmed death-ligand 1 (PD-L1) inhibitor treatments. Alongside this development, Gilead Sciences also recalled a specific lot of its COVID-19 treatment due to the presence of glass particles. The voluntary withdrawal of Trodelvy's approval in the U.S. was made in coordination with the FDA and does not impact the drug's other approved indications, both domestically and internationally. Trodelvy had received accelerated approval for metastatic urothelial cancer... (To read the full story, visit Benzinga.com.)

news.headline: Unions oppose Novo's $16.5B acquisition of Catalent due to concerns about competition in diabetes and obesity treatments.
news.summary: A group consisting of labor unions, consumer advocates, and public interest organizations has communicated their strong disapproval to Lina Khan, the Chair of the Federal Trade Commission (FTC), regarding the proposed acquisition of Catalent Inc. by Novo Holdings for a substantial sum of $16.5 billion. The deal aims to combine the forces of Novo Nordisk A/S, a major player in GLP-1 drug development, with Catalent, a prominent global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO). The concerns raised by the coalition highlight potential risks to competition, particularly in crucial sectors like diabetes, obesity treatments, and gene therapies. This move could have far-reaching effects on market dynamics in these key areas.

news.headline: Canadian Olympic snowboarder allegedly used USDT in cocaine smuggling operation as per US authorities.
news.summary: According to American authorities, a group led by a Canadian Olympic snowboarder is accused of engaging in a cocaine trafficking operation that involved the use of Tether (USDT) cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Mattel set to report Q3 2024 earnings on Oct. 23, 2024. Earnings estimates at 94 cents, down 13% YoY, revenue expected at $1.84 billion (down 4.1%). Negative impact expected due to soft sales in North America.
news.summary: Mattel, Inc. is set to report its third-quarter 2024 results on October 23, 2024. In the previous quarter, the company's earnings surpassed expectations by 18.8%. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Q3 earnings is at 94 cents, a 13% decrease year over year, with revenue estimated at $1.84 billion, a 4.1% decline. Sales in North America are expected to be weak, particularly in Infant, Toddler, Preschool, Dolls, and Vehicle products due to a challenging economic environment. The company is facing headwinds that may impact its performance in the upcoming quarter.

news.headline: Watercrest Senior Living in Vero Beach, FL prioritizes resident safety during hurricanes; offers world-class communities in southeastern US.
news.summary: Watercrest Senior Living Group, a leading provider of senior living facilities in the southeastern United States, prioritizes hurricane safety and preparedness in its communities. The organization, based in Vero Beach, Florida, boasts world-class amenities and services for elderly residents. Its commitment to ensuring the welfare of its residents during natural disasters is commendable.

news.summary: The debate on October 17 was probably the last encounter between the two Senate candidates before the election in November.

news.headline: BlackRock considers using BUIDL for derivatives collateral on Binance, OKX, and Debirit exchanges.
news.summary: There are discussions reportedly underway between BlackRock and Securitize regarding the potential integration of BUIDL as collateral for derivatives trading on major platforms such as Binance, OKX, and Debirit. This partnership could have a significant impact on the cryptocurrency market, as these platforms are crucial players in the industry. The incorporation of BUIDL as collateral could bring liquidity and accessibility to the asset, potentially increasing its value and trading volume. This development exemplifies the continued growth and innovation within the cryptocurrency sector, with important implications for market participants and investors.

news.summary: The much-anticipated token launch by Trump saw disappointing sales figures, causing concern among investors regarding the centralization of Ethereum block builders.

news.headline: Community health workers rally for fair deal at SRCHC due to underfunding, understaffing. 8+ months bargaining, wage talks stalled. CUPE Local 5399 members demand action.
news.summary: In Toronto, community health care workers at the South Riverdale Community Health Centre (SRCHC) are organizing a solidarity rally on Tuesday to protest the ongoing issues of severe underfunding and understaffing. Despite negotiations spanning over eight months, SRCHC management has not been able to come to an agreement with members of CUPE Local 5399 regarding wages. This has led to a prolonged period of chronic understaffing at the center, causing significant strain on the workforce. The rally aims to highlight these challenges and urge management to address the concerns raised by the workers.
